  Description: ['YPA omnidirectional headset microphone review (for linguists) Please note that all of the comments below must be kept in perspective: This microphone costs $39.99, which is 10-20 times less than its current mainstream competition. Luckily, with a phantom power adaptor, such microphones can also be used in a wired configuration, provided phantom power is supplied by a microphone pre-amplifier or field recorder. The microphone has good electrical and acoustic performance, certainly better than the price sticker might indicate. The microphone is quite useable. It has high sensitivity and low self-noise. The frequency response in the speech-specific part of the spectrum is good, with no indication of any particular bias. Transient response and phase response are both very good, as well.
